AdminEmployerRead.description:
Admin view of an employer's verification state. `reviewed_at`/`reason`
are derived — there is no separate review table; `audit_logs` is the history.
AdminEmployerRead.title: AdminEmployerRead

JobDetailApplicationRead.description:
Slim Application shape for the JobDetailResponse.

Mirrors the fields of ``routes/applications.py::ApplicationRead`` but
lives here so jobs.py doesn't import from applications.py.
JobDetailApplicationRead.title: JobDetailApplicationRead

JobDetailSavedJobRead.description:
Slim SavedJob shape for the JobDetailResponse.

Mirrors ``routes/saved_jobs.py::SavedJobRead`` — same field set the
Flutter ``SavedJobDto`` reads (it ignores ``updated_at`` but the
canonical Read includes it, so we match for consistency).
JobDetailSavedJobRead.title: JobDetailSavedJobRead

ProfileUpdate.description:
Partial profile update. Only keys present in the request are applied
(`model_fields_set`); an explicit null clears a nullable column. `full_name`
and `locations` are non-nullable and reject an explicit null.
ProfileUpdate.title: ProfileUpdate

ResumeRead.description: Response shape for resume metadata. Bytes are never returned here.
ResumeRead.title: ResumeRead

jobify_api__routes__schemas__EmployerRea.description: Wire shape: a verified bool, not the underlying verified_at timestamp.
jobify_api__routes__schemas__EmployerRea.title: EmployerRead

get.description: List the authenticated applicant's resumes, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Resumes V1 Applicants Me Resumes Get

get.description:
Paginated list of the current applicant's applications (incl. withdrawn).

Cursor: base64 of {"created_at": ISO8601, "application_id": uuid}.
Order:  created_at DESC, id DESC.
ETag:   W/"sha256(applicant_id|max_updated_at|count)".

patch.description:
Withdraw an application.

Only ``applied → withdrawn`` is accepted.  Re-withdraw is a 200 no-op.
Any other target status → 400 invalid_transition.

get.description:
Download the latest resume of the applicant who applied to one of the
recruiter's jobs.

Error ladder:
- 401 — no/invalid bearer token (current_user).
- 403 not_a_recruiter — caller is not a recruiter.
- 404 not found — application doesn't exist, belongs to another employer's
  job, applicant has no resume, or the application is soft-deleted.
  Deliberately uniform to avoid existence leaks.

Emits structured audit log ``recruiter.resume-accessed`` on success.

schema.title: Response List My Employers V1 Employers Me Get
Response List Invites V1 Employers  Employer Id  Invites Get
Response List Members V1 Employers  Employer Id  Members Get

post.description:
Apply to an open job.

Idempotent:
- Existing applied row → 200 with the existing row.
- Existing withdrawn row → UPDATE back to applied, refresh created_at.
- No existing row → INSERT. → 201.

Error ladder: 401 (auth) → 403 (role) → 404 (job missing/closed/deleted).

delete.description:
Unsave a job (soft-delete the saved-job row).

204 No Content regardless of whether the row existed — the UI calls this
optimistically without checking state first.

Error ladder: 401 (auth) → 403 (role). No 404 — missing row is a no-op.

post.description:
Save an open job for the current applicant.

Idempotent — re-saving an already-saved job returns 200 with the existing row.
New save → 201.

Error ladder: 401 (auth) → 403 (role) → 404 (job missing/closed/deleted).

delete.description:
DPDP § 12 right-of-erasure. Soft-delete-and-scrub User + Applicant
tombstones; hard-delete around them. Atomic — partial deletion is worse
than no deletion.

post.description:
Return a JSON dump of every row tied to the authenticated user.

DPDP § 11 right-of-access. Sync at MVP scale; if/when audit history
exceeds ~10K rows per user, switch to async + signed-URL.

schema.title: Response List My Invites V1 Me Invites Get

get.description:
Paginated list of the current applicant's notifications.

Returns pending, dispatching, and sent rows. Failed rows are excluded
(admin-only). Cursor: base64 of {"created_at": ISO8601, "notification_id": uuid}.
Order: created_at DESC, id DESC. ETag: W/"sha256(user_id|max_updated_at|count)".

post.description:
Mark a notification as read.

Scoped to the current user. 404 for missing or another user's notification.
Idempotent: already-read notifications return 200 with the existing read_at.

get.description:
Paginated list of the current applicant's saved jobs.

Saved jobs that have since been closed still appear — only the job
soft-delete is filtered. Unsaved rows (deleted_at IS NOT NULL) are excluded.

Cursor: base64 of {"created_at": ISO8601, "saved_job_id": uuid}.
Order:  created_at DESC, id DESC.
ETag:   W/"sha256(applicant_id|max_updated_at|count)".
